Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to analyze a process tree model for a Procure to Pay P2P process

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The current model has a sequence Create Req to Approve Req to Parallel Create PO Receive Goods Receive Invoice Match Invoice Pay Invoice to Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This is clearly wrong because P2P has strict dependencies eg you cannot receive goods before creating a PO cannot pay before matching invoice etc

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: I need to identify issues provide a corrected process tree Python code using pm4py objects process tree obj and explain the corrections
